name: Australian Agricultural Company Limited.
analysis: AAC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.3270, stop A$1.2771, target A$1.4767 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
